tax_exclusive_desc: Tax is calculated on base price and added to it.
tax_inclusive_desc: The price already includes the tax amount.
glossary_principal_desc: The original sum of money you invest or borrow before any interest is earned or charged. Think of it as your starting amount — the base on which interest is calculated.
glossary_interest_rate_desc: The annual percentage charged on a loan or earned on an investment. "p.a." stands for "per annum", meaning per year. A 10% p.a. rate means you earn or pay 10% of the principal each year.
glossary_time_period_desc: The total duration for which your money is invested or borrowed. You can enter this in years, months, weeks, or days — the calculator automatically converts it to years for the formula.
glossary_compounding_freq_desc: How often the earned interest is added to the principal. The more frequently interest compounds (e.g., monthly vs yearly), the faster your money grows — because each period's interest earns its own interest in the next period.
glossary_simple_interest_desc: Interest calculated only on the original principal amount. The interest amount stays the same every period. Formula: Interest = Principal × Rate × Time.
glossary_compound_interest_desc: Interest calculated on both the principal and the accumulated interest from previous periods. This creates a "snowball effect" — your money grows exponentially over time. Formula: A = P × (1 + r/n)^(n×t).

data_ownership_body: Your financial records, transactions, notes, and profiles are stored locally on your device's secure database. We do not transmit or process your financial information on external servers, except when you choose to use our cloud backup and sync service.
firebase_backup_body: If you choose to log in and enable cloud synchronization, your transactions, categories, budgets, and profile data are backed up to secure Firebase servers (Cloud Firestore). This data is strictly used to synchronize your entries across devices and is encrypted in transit and at rest.
security_encryption_body: Your local database is stored in your device's isolated storage directory, accessible only by this application. In addition, when biometric security (Face ID / Touch ID) is enabled, access to the application is protected using your device's native secure enclave. We never collect or store your biometric credentials.
no_selling_sharing_body: We value your privacy. We do not sell, rent, lease, or share your financial logs, personal email, display name, or profile configurations with any third-party advertisers, companies, or analytics networks.
rights_deletion_body: You retain absolute ownership and control over your data. At any time, you can clear all transactions, delete your custom profiles, or delete your entire account and synced backups directly from the Settings menu. Once deleted, the action cannot be undone and your data is permanently wiped from our databases.
policy_changes_body: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this screen. We encourage you to review this policy periodically for any updates to stay informed about how we protect your information.
contact_support_body: If you have any questions or feedback regarding this Privacy Policy or your data, please contact our support team from the Settings menu or email us directly.
faq_subtitle: Quick answers to help you navigate the app
faq_biometric_a: Open Settings → Account → Biometric Settings. Toggle the switch off, then on again to re-enroll your biometrics.
faq_export_statements_a: Go to Reports → Party Statement. Select the party and date range, then tap the Export button to save as PDF.
faq_backup_a: Transactions are stored locally on your device. Enable cloud backup in Settings → Preferences to keep your data safe.
faq_edit_budget_a: Navigate to Dashboard → Budget Card → Tap the budget you want to modify. Adjust the amount or category and save.
